title: Policy: Manage Policies for Multiple Devices
scenario: Policy settings applied to multiple connected Poly devices are correctly reflected with proper locked/unlocked states on each device's settings page in the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, ensure at least two Poly Bluetooth audio devices are connected (e.g., Poly Voyager 5200 and Poly Savi 8220).
3. From the Home screen, tap on the first connected device (e.g., Poly Voyager 5200) to open its Device Settings page.

4. Navigate to Audio Settings and verify each policy-controlled feature (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications) displays the correct locked/unlocked state as defined by the applied policy.
6. Tap on the second connected device (e.g., Poly Savi 8220) to open its Device Settings page.
7. Navigate to Audio Settings and verify each policy-controlled feature displays the correct locked/unlocked state as defined by the policy applied to this specific device.
8. Compare the settings pages of both devices to confirm that each device independently reflects its own policy settings.
expected: Each connected Poly device's settings page in the Poly Studio Mobile app correctly displays its respective policy settings, with locked/unlocked states accurately reflecting the device management rules applied to that specific device.
